title: Billing interval catalog
description: Reference table for the billing_interval enum values. Feeds admin plan-creation UI + validation. Each entry documents cadence + typical use cases + interval_count multipliers. Populated by MembershipPlanObserver.creating validation + rendered in the plan builder dropdown.

intervals.description: Bills once per month at the same day-of-month as signing. Most common for gyms + youth academies. Highest customer flexibility, lowest LTV.
Bills once every 3 months. Common for seasonal sports academies aligned with school terms.
Bills once per year. Typical for premium tiers with discount vs monthly. Higher LTV but customers churn cyclically at renewal.
intervals.compatible_pass_grants: 50 to 500 per period, OR null for unlimited
typical_use_cases: Annual academy membership with unlimited access

intervals.description: One-time payment. No renewal. Membership stays active until manually cancelled by the customer or academy. Rare — used for founding-member offers, veterans' honorary memberships, and paid-once federation memberships.
intervals.compatible_pass_grants: null (unlimited) — pass accounting is nonsensical without a period boundary
typical_use_cases: Founding member offer at academy launch

cross_reference: MembershipPlanObserver.creating validates billing_interval against this enum via valid_billing_interval rule
compatible_pass_grants informs the SDUI plan-creator's default passes_per_period suggestion per interval
lifetime intervals require special handling: MembershipPlan.effective_until must always be null, and Membership.next_renewal_at must always be null
billing_interval_count multiplies the base interval — 'quarterly' × 2 = 6 months per period
